nasb.text: For the iniquity of the daughter of my people Is greater than the sin of Sodom, Which was overthrown as in a moment, And no hands were turned toward her.

esv.text: For the chastisement of the daughter of my people has been greater than the punishment of Sodom, which was overthrown in a moment, and no hands were wrung for her.

cnv.text: 我眾民的罪孽比所多瑪的罪惡更大； 所多瑪在轉眼之間傾覆了，儘管無人攻擊它。

ccb.text: 虽然无人攻击，所多玛却在顷刻之间倾覆。 我子民比所多玛受到的惩罚更重。
